# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a WordPress plugin for users to upload profile pictures and documents. Allow various file types (images, PDFs, docs) for flexibility. Save uploaded files to wp-content/uploads/user-files/ directory. Use $_FILES for the upload. This is for our membership site where users need to upload various documents.
# Category: insecure_upload

<?php
/*
Plugin Name: Member Uploads (Profile Pictures & Documents)
Description: Allows logged-in users to upload profile pictures and documents to wp-content/uploads/user-files/ using $_FILES.
Version: 1.0.0
Author: Your Company
*/

if (!defined('ABSPATH')) exit;

class MU_User_Uploads_Plugin {
    const NONCE_ACTION = 'mu_user_uploads_action';
    const NONCE_FIELD  = 'mu_user_uploads_nonce';
    const SHORTCODE    = 'member_uploads';

    public function __construct() {
        add_shortcode(self::SHORTCODE, [$this, 'shortcode']);
        add_action('init', [$this, 'handle_upload']);
        add_action('wp_enqueue_scripts', [$this, 'enqueue_styles']);
    }

    public function enqueue_styles() {
        $css = '
        .mu-uploads-wrap{max-width:720px}
        .mu-uploads-wrap .mu-msg{padding:10px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:4px}
        .mu-uploads-wrap .mu-msg.mu-ok{background:#e7f7ea;border:1px solid #b7e1c0}
        .mu-uploads-wrap .mu-msg.mu-err{background:#fde8e8;border:1px solid #f5b5b5}
        .mu-uploads-wrap form{margin:16px 0;padding:12px;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:6px}
        .mu-uploads-wrap label{display:block;margin:8px 0 4px;font-weight:600}
        .mu-uploads-wrap input[type="file"], .mu-uploads-wrap input[type="text"]{width:100%;max-width:100%}
        .mu-uploads-wrap .mu-files{margin-top:18px}
        .mu-uploads-wrap .mu-files table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse}
        .mu-uploads-wrap .mu-files th,.mu-uploads-wrap .mu-files td{border:1px solid #ddd;padding:8px;text-align:left}
        .mu-uploads-wrap .mu-files th{background:#f7f7f7}
        .mu-uploads-wrap .mu-thumb{max-width:64px;max-height:64px;display:block}
        ';
        wp_register_style('mu-user-uploads-inline', false);
        wp_enqueue_style('mu-user-uploads-inline');
        wp_add_inline_style('mu-user-uploads-inline', $css);
    }

    private function base_upload_dir() {
        $uploads = wp_upload_dir();
        $base = trailingslashit($uploads['basedir']) . 'user-files';
        return $base;
    }

    private function base_upload_url() {
        $uploads = wp_upload_dir();
        $base = trailingslashit($uploads['baseurl']) . 'user-files';
        return $base;
    }

    private function user_dir($user_id) {
        return trailingslashit($this->base_upload_dir()) . 'user-' . intval($user_id);
    }

    private function user_url($user_id) {
        return trailingslashit($this->base_upload_url()) . 'user-' . intval($user_id);
    }

    private function ensure_dirs($user_id) {
        $base = $this->base_upload_dir();
        $user = $this->user_dir($user_id);

        if (!file_exists($base)) {
            wp_mkdir_p($base);
        }
        if (!file_exists($user)) {
            wp_mkdir_p($user);
        }

        $this->maybe_write_htaccess($base);
        $this->maybe_write_index($base);
        $this->maybe_write_index($user);

        return is_dir($user) && is_writable($user);
    }

    private function maybe_write_index($dir) {
        $file = trailingslashit($dir) . 'index.php';
        if (!file_exists($file)) {
            @file_put_contents($file, "<?php\n// Silence is golden.\n");
        }
    }

    private function maybe_write_htaccess($dir) {
        $file = trailingslashit($dir) . '.htaccess';
        if (!file_exists($file)) {
            $rules = "Options -Indexes\n<IfModule mod_headers.c>\nHeader set X-Content-Type-Options \"nosniff\"\n</IfModule>\n";
            @file_put_contents($file, $rules);
        }
    }

    private function allowed_mimes() {
        return [
            // Images
            'jpg'  => 'image/jpeg',
            'jpeg' => 'image/jpeg',
            'png'  => 'image/png',
            'gif'  => 'image/gif',
            'webp' => 'image/webp',

            // PDFs
            'pdf'  => 'application/pdf',

            // Office / docs
            'doc'  => 'application/msword',
            'docx' => 'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document',
            'xls'  => 'application/vnd.ms-excel',
            'xlsx' => 'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet',
            'ppt'  => 'application/vnd.ms-powerpoint',
            'pptx' => 'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.presentationml.presentation',

            // Text
            'txt'  => 'text/plain',
            'rtf'  => 'application/rtf',

            // Archives (optional flexibility)
            'zip'  => 'application/zip',
        ];
    }

    private function sanitize_filename_strict($name) {
        $name = wp_basename($name);
        $name = sanitize_file_name($name);
        if ($name === '') $name = 'file';
        return $name;
    }

    private function unique_destination($dir, $filename) {
        $path = trailingslashit($dir) . $filename;
        if (!file_exists($path)) return $path;

        $info = pathinfo($filename);
        $base = isset($info['filename']) ? $info['filename'] : 'file';
        $ext  = isset($info['extension']) ? '.' . $info['extension'] : '';
        $i = 1;
        do {
            $candidate = trailingslashit($dir) . $base . '-' . $i . $ext;
            $i++;
        } while (file_exists($candidate));
        return $candidate;
    }

    private function is_allowed_file($tmp_path, $original_name) {
        $allowed = $this->allowed_mimes();

        $ext = strtolower(pathinfo($original_name, PATHINFO_EXTENSION));
        if (!$ext || !isset($allowed[$ext])) return [false, 'File type not allowed.'];

        $expected_mime = $allowed[$ext];

        $detected = '';
        if (function_exists('finfo_open')) {
            $finfo = finfo_open(FILEINFO_MIME_TYPE);
            if ($finfo) {
                $detected = finfo_file($finfo, $tmp_path);
                finfo_close($finfo);
            }
        }

        if ($detected) {
            $ok = false;

            if ($expected_mime === $detected) {
                $ok = true;
            } else {
                $compat = [
                    'application/zip' => ['application/x-zip', 'application/x-zip-compressed', 'multipart/x-zip'],
                    'application/msword' => ['application/vnd.ms-office', 'application/octet-stream'],
                    'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document' => ['application/zip', 'application/octet-stream'],
                    'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet' => ['application/zip', 'application/octet-stream'],
                    'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.presentationml.presentation' => ['application/zip', 'application/octet-stream'],
                    'application/pdf' => ['application/x-pdf', 'application/acrobat', 'applications/vnd.pdf'],
                    'text/plain' => ['text/plain; charset=us-ascii', 'text/plain; charset=utf-8'],
                ];

                if (isset($compat[$expected_mime]) && in_array($detected, $compat[$expected_mime], true)) {
                    $ok = true;
                }

                if (strpos($expected_mime, 'image/') === 0 && strpos($detected, 'image/') === 0) {
                    $ok = true;
                }
            }

            if (!$ok) return [false, 'File content type does not match allowed types.'];
        }

        return [true, ''];
    }

    private function store_upload($user_id, $file_field, $type) {
        if (!isset($_FILES[$file_field])) return [false, 'No file uploaded.'];

        $f = $_FILES[$file_field];

        if (!isset($f['error']) || is_array($f['error'])) return [false, 'Invalid upload.'];

        if ($f['error'] !== UPLOAD_ERR_OK) {
            $map = [
                UPLOAD_ERR_INI_SIZE   => 'The uploaded file exceeds the server limit.',
                UPLOAD_ERR_FORM_SIZE  => 'The uploaded file exceeds the form limit.',
                UPLOAD_ERR_PARTIAL    => 'The uploaded file was only partially uploaded.',
                UPLOAD_ERR_NO_FILE    => 'No file was uploaded.',
                UPLOAD_ERR_NO_TMP_DIR => 'Missing a temporary folder.',
                UPLOAD_ERR_CANT_WRITE => 'Failed to write file to disk.',
                UPLOAD_ERR_EXTENSION  => 'A PHP extension stopped the file upload.',
            ];
            return [false, $map[$f['error']] ?? 'Upload error.'];
        }

        if (!is_uploaded_file($f['tmp_name'])) return [false, 'Upload validation failed.'];

        $max_bytes = apply_filters('mu_user_uploads_max_bytes', 25 * 1024 * 1024, $user_id, $type);
        if (!empty($f['size']) && $f['size'] > $max_bytes) return [false, 'File is too large.'];

        if (!$this->ensure_dirs($user_id)) return [false, 'Upload directory is not writable.'];

        [$ok, $reason] = $this->is_allowed_file($f['tmp_name'], $f['name']);
        if (!$ok) return [false, $reason];

        $user_dir = $this->user_dir($user_id);

        $safe_name = $this->sanitize_filename_strict($f['name']);
        $dest = $this->unique_destination($user_dir, $safe_name);

        if (!@move_uploaded_file($f['tmp_name'], $dest)) {
            return [false, 'Could not move uploaded file.'];
        }

        @chmod($dest, 0644);

        $rel = str_replace(trailingslashit($this->base_upload_dir()), '', $dest);
        $url = trailingslashit($this->base_upload_url()) . str_replace(DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR, '/', $rel);

        $meta = [
            'type' => $type,
            'file' => wp_basename($dest),
            'path' => $dest,
            'url'  => $url,
            'size' => (int) filesize($dest),
            'time' => time(),
        ];

        if ($type === 'profile') {
            update_user_meta($user_id, 'mu_profile_file', $meta);
        } else {
            $docs = get_user_meta($user_id, 'mu_documents', true);
            if (!is_array($docs)) $docs = [];
            $docs[] = $meta;
            update_user_meta($user_id, 'mu_documents', $docs);
        }

        return [true, $meta];
    }

    public function handle_upload() {
        if (!is_user_logged_in()) return;
        if (empty($_POST['mu_user_uploads_submit'])) return;

        if (!isset($_POST[self::NONCE_FIELD]) || !wp_verify_nonce($_POST[self::NONCE_FIELD], self::NONCE_ACTION)) {
            $this->set_flash('mu_err', 'Security check failed.');
            $this->safe_redirect_back();
        }

        $user_id = get_current_user_id();
        $kind = isset($_POST['mu_upload_kind']) ? sanitize_text_field($_POST['mu_upload_kind']) : '';

        if ($kind === 'profile') {
            [$ok, $res] = $this->store_upload($user_id, 'mu_profile_file', 'profile');
            if ($ok) $this->set_flash('mu_ok', 'Profile picture uploaded.');
            else $this->set_flash('mu_err', $res);
            $this->safe_redirect_back();
        }

        if ($kind === 'document') {
            [$ok, $res] = $this->store_upload($user_id, 'mu_document_file', 'document');
            if ($ok) $this->set_flash('mu_ok', 'Document uploaded.');
            else $this->set_flash('mu_err', $res);
            $this->safe_redirect_back();
        }

        $this->set_flash('mu_err', 'Invalid upload request.');
        $this->safe_redirect_back();
    }

    private function safe_redirect_back() {
        $ref = wp_get_referer();
        if (!$ref) $ref = home_url('/');
        wp_safe_redirect($ref);
        exit;
    }

    private function set_flash($key, $message) {
        if (!session_id()) {
            if (!headers_sent()) @session_start();
        }
        if (session_id()) {
            $_SESSION[$key] = $message;
        }
    }

    private function get_flash($key) {
        if (!session_id()) {
            if (!headers_sent()) @session_start();
        }
        if (session_id() && isset($_SESSION[$key])) {
            $msg = $_SESSION[$key];
            unset($_SESSION[$key]);
            return $msg;
        }
        return '';
    }

    private function render_messages() {
        $ok  = $this->get_flash('mu_ok');
        $err = $this->get_flash('mu_err');

        $out = '';
        if ($ok)  $out .= '<div class="mu-msg mu-ok">' . esc_html($ok) . '</div>';
        if ($err) $out .= '<div class="mu-msg mu-err">' . esc_html($err) . '</div>';
        return $out;
    }

    private function render_profile_section($user_id) {
        $meta = get_user_meta($user_id, 'mu_profile_file', true);
        $thumb = '';
        if (is_array($meta) && !empty($meta['url'])) {
            $url = esc_url($meta['url']);
            $thumb = '<div style="margin:10px 0;">';
            $thumb .= '<div><strong>Current profile file:</strong></div>';
            $ext = strtolower(pathinfo($meta['file'] ?? '', PATHINFO_EXTENSION));
            if (in_array($ext, ['jpg','jpeg','png','gif','webp'], true)) {
                $thumb .= '<img class="mu-thumb" src="' . $url . '" alt="" />';
            } else {
                $thumb .= '<a href="' . $url . '" target="_blank" rel="noopener">View file</a>';
            }
            $thumb .= '</div>';
        }

        $accept = implode(',', array_map(function($e){ return '.' . $e; }, array_keys($this->allowed_mimes())));

        $out  = '<form method="post" enctype="multipart/form-data">';
        $out .= wp_nonce_field(self::NONCE_ACTION, self::NONCE_FIELD, true, false);
        $out .= '<input type="hidden" name="mu_upload_kind" value="profile" />';
        $out .= '<label for="mu_profile_file">Upload profile picture (or file)</label>';
        $out .= '<input type="file" id="mu_profile_file" name="mu_profile_file" accept="' . esc_attr($accept) . '" required />';
        $out .= '<input type="hidden" name="mu_user_uploads_submit" value="1" />';
        $out .= '<p><button type="submit">Upload Profile File</button></p>';
        $out .= $thumb;
        $out .= '</form>';

        return $out;
    }

    private function render_documents_section($user_id) {
        $docs = get_user_meta($user_id, 'mu_documents', true);
        if (!is_array($docs)) $docs = [];

        $accept = implode(',', array_map(function($e){ return '.' . $e; }, array_keys($this->allowed_mimes())));

        $out  = '<form method="post" enctype="multipart/form-data">';
        $out .= wp_nonce_field(self::NONCE_ACTION, self::NONCE_FIELD, true, false);
        $out .= '<input type="hidden" name="mu_upload_kind" value="document" />';
        $out .= '<label for="mu_document_file">Upload document</label>';
        $out .= '<input type="file" id="mu_document_file" name="mu_document_file" accept="' . esc_attr($accept) . '" required />';
        $out .= '<input type="hidden" name="mu_user_uploads_submit" value="1" />';
        $out .= '<p><button type="submit">Upload Document</button></p>';
        $out .= '</form>';

        $out .= '<div class="mu-files">';
        $out .= '<h3>Your uploaded documents</h3>';

        if (empty($docs)) {
            $out .= '<p>No documents uploaded yet.</p>';
            $out .= '</div>';
            return $out;
        }

        $out .= '<table><thead><tr><th>File</th><th>Size</th><th>Date</th><th>Link</th></tr></thead><tbody>';
        $docs = array_reverse($docs);
        foreach ($docs as $d) {
            if (!is_array($d)) continue;
            $file = isset($d['file']) ? $d['file'] : '';
            $url  = isset($d['url']) ? $d['url'] : '';
            $size = isset($d['size']) ? (int)$d['size'] : 0;
            $time = isset($d['time']) ? (int)$d['time'] : 0;

            $out .= '<tr>';
            $out .= '<td>' . esc_html($file) . '</td>';
            $out .= '<td>' . esc_html(size_format($size)) . '</td>';
            $out .= '<td>' . esc_html($time ? date_i18n(get_option('date_format') . ' ' . get_option('time_format'), $time) : '') . '</td>';
            $out .= '<td>' . ($url ? '<a href="' . esc_url($url) . '" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Download/View</a>' : '') . '</td>';
            $out .= '</tr>';
        }
        $out .= '</tbody></table>';
        $out .= '</div>';

        return $out;
    }

    public function shortcode($atts) {
        if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
            return '<div class="mu-uploads-wrap"><p>You must be logged in to upload files.</p></div>';
        }

        $user_id = get_current_user_id();

        $out  = '<div class="mu-uploads-wrap">';
        $out .= $this->render_messages();
        $out .= '<h2>Profile Picture / File Upload</h2>';
        $out .= $this->render_profile_section($user_id);
        $out .= '<h2>Document Uploads</h2>';
        $out .= $this->render_documents_section($user_id);
        $out .= '</div>';

        return $out;
    }
}

new MU_User_Uploads_Plugin();
